article_meta.title: New York Playbook POLITICO's must-read briefing informing the daily conversation among knowledgeable New Yorkers New Yor

reasoning: The model systematically flagged quoted/attributed source statements as author bias, used non-approved bias type labels, and missed at least one clear instance of bias in the author’s own prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages come from sources’ quotes or an interviewee’s responses, not the author’s connecting prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Every item is a quoted/attributed statement; none are genuine author-voice bias instances.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed defensible author-level bias such as ‘murky ethics’ and possibly ‘evading the prohibition’ in the author’s framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (e.g., Loaded Language, Assertion as Fact, Negative Framing, Partisan Labeling) instead of the specified taxonomy.
